mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT
info.table_schema as tbl_schema, attrelid::regclass as tbl_id, attnum as col_uid, attname as col_id, (SELECT col_description(attrelid, attnum)) AS col_nm, info.data_type, info.character_maximum_length as string_size, info.numeric_precision, info.numeric_precision_radix, info.numeric_scale,
COALESCE(( SELECT attr2.attname FROM pg_index idx JOIN pg_attribute attr2 ON attr2.attrelid = idx.indrelid AND attr2.attnum = ANY(idx.indkey) WHERE attr2.attrelid in ('${schema}.${table}'::regclass) AND idx.indisprimary AND attr2.attname = attr.attname ) = attname, false) as is_pkey
FROM pg_attribute as attr
,(SELECT * FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = '${table}' AND TABLE_SCHEMA = #{schema} ) as info
WHERE attrelid in ( '${schema}.${table}'::regclass ) AND attnum > 0 AND NOT attisdropped
AND attr.attname = info.column_name
ORDER BY 1, 2;

SELECT attrelid::regclass as tbl_id, attnum as col_uid, attname as col_id, (SELECT col_description(attrelid, attnum)) AS col_nm
FROM pg_attribute
WHERE attrelid in ( 'xeus.mt_aces_log'::regclass , 'xeus.mt_allow_ip'::regclass , 'xeus.mt_asset_log'::regclass , 'xeus.mt_auth_grp'::regclass , 'xeus.mt_auth_list'::regclass , 'xeus.mt_auth_log'::regclass , 'xeus.mt_cmm_cde'::regclass , 'xeus.mt_notc_list'::regclass , 'xeus.mt_orgz_desc'::regclass , 'xeus.mt_usr_desc'::regclass , 'xeus.mt_sym_icon'::regclass ) AND attnum > 0 AND NOT attisdropped AND attname NOT IN('_geometry', '_annox', '_annoy')
ORDER BY attrelid, attnum
SELECT schema_name FROM information_schema.schemata WHERE schema_name NOT IN ('pg_toast','pg_temp_1','pg_toast_temp_1','pg_catalog','information_schema','ods','tiger','tiger_data','topology');

SELECT
a.* , st_astext(a._geometry) as geometry_wkt , st_area(_geometry) as geometry_area , st_length(_geometry) as geometry_length , st_x(st_centroid(st_transform(_geometry, 4326))) as geometry_lon , st_y(st_centroid(st_transform(_geometry, 4326))) as geometry_lat
FROM ${st.schema}.${st.table} AS a
AND "${map.key}" = #{map.val}::numeric
AND LOWER("${map.key}") LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{map.val}) || '%'
AND ST_INTERSECTS( ( SELECT ST_GeomFromText(#{spatialSt.wkt}, 5186) ), a._geometry )
${st.sortCol} ${st.sortTyp}
LIMIT ${st.limit} OFFSET ${st.offset}

SELECT
count(a.*)
FROM ${st.schema}.${st.table} AS a
AND "${map.key}" = #{map.val}::numeric
AND LOWER("${map.key}") LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{map.val}) || '%'
AND ST_INTERSECTS( ( SELECT ST_GeomFromText(#{spatialSt.wkt}, 5186) ), a._geometry )

SELECT
sum(st_area(a._geometry)) as geometry_area , sum(st_length(a._geometry)) as geometry_length
FROM ${st.schema}.${st.table} AS a
AND "${map.key}" = #{map.val}::numeric
AND LOWER("${map.key}") LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{map.val}) || '%'
AND ST_INTERSECTS( ( SELECT ST_GeomFromText(#{spatialSt.wkt}, 5186) ), a._geometry )

CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW ${st.newSchema}.${st.newTable} AS
SELECT
a.*
FROM ${st.schema}.${st.table} AS a
AND "${map.key}" = '${map.val}'::numeric AND LOWER("${map.key}") LIKE '%' || LOWER('${map.val}') || '%'
AND ST_INTERSECTS( ( SELECT ST_GeomFromText(#{spatialSt.wkt}, 5186) ), a._geometry )
; COMMENT ON VIEW ${st.newSchema}.${st.newTable} IS '${st.layerNm}';
COMMENT ON COLUMN ${st.newSchema}.${st.newTable}."${typ.col}" IS '${typ.nm}';
SELECT EXISTS (SELECT FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = #{schemNm} AND table_name = #{tblId});
SELECT EXISTS (SELECT FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = #{schemNm} AND table_name = #{tblId} AND column_name = #{columnNm});
ALTER TABLE ${schemNm}.${tblId} ADD COLUMN ${colId} ${colType}(${colSize}); COMMENT ON COLUMN ${schemNm}.${tblId}.${colId} IS '${colNm}';
ALTER TABLE ${schemNm}.${tblId} DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS ${colId};
